nodes.name: Enrichment Trigger
nodes.notes: Called by z-siem-offense-to-case after Respond OK. Input: case_id, indicator, indicator_type, source_ip

nodes.name: Build Targets
nodes.notes: Expand indicator + public source_ip into provider work items

nodes.name: Has Targets?
nodes.notes: True = real target → cache/providers; False = sentinel → straight to Aggregate

nodes.name: Cache Get
nodes.notes: Look up per-provider cached verdict; empty if miss or sentinel

nodes.name: Cache Hit?
nodes.notes: True = cached verdict present; False = needs live provider call

nodes.name: Decode Cache Hit
nodes.notes: Cache hit → parse stored result JSON back to {provider,ok,data}

nodes.name: Route Provider
nodes.notes: Send each work item to its provider HTTP node

nodes.name: AbuseIPDB
nodes.notes: IP reputation; failure → continue with empty body

nodes.name: Shodan
nodes.notes: Host context; 404 = no info (treated as clean), not failure

nodes.name: Normalize Result
nodes.notes: Map raw provider responses into {provider, ok, data}

nodes.name: Only Cache OK
nodes.notes: Gate: only ok results get written to cache

nodes.name: Cache Set
nodes.notes: Cache only successful results (failed ones skipped before this node)
